hypotheses.expected_behavior: Directional persistence survives a bounded pause and resumes.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Persistent momentum after a short pause has measurable continuation value.
hypotheses.observation: Momentum persistence is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.566028, event_rate=0.548706, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

test_summary.definition: Share of same-direction closes inside the recent lookback, weighted by 5-bar return direction.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if persistence-filtered candidates fail unchanged gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Share of same-direction closes inside the recent lookback, weighted by 5-bar return direction.

hypotheses.title: Momentum persistence market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: Acceleration persists after entry rather than immediately reverting.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Positive trend acceleration identifies momentum entries with better continuation odds.
hypotheses.observation: Trend acceleration is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.290507, event_rate=0.241987, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

test_summary.definition: Recent 5-bar return improvement versus the prior 5-bar return, scaled by recent volatility.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if acceleration-filtered candidates fail unchanged economic or stability gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Recent 5-bar return improvement versus the prior 5-bar return, scaled by recent volatility.

hypotheses.title: Trend acceleration market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: A new volatility/trend state produces distinct strategy performance.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Structural shifts identify when old local behavior should not be extrapolated blindly.
hypotheses.observation: Structural market shift is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.472835, event_rate=0.227093, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

test_summary.definition: Recent trend and volatility state diverges materially from the preceding baseline.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if shift-aware candidates do not improve robustness under unchanged validation gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Recent trend and volatility state diverges materially from the preceding baseline.

hypotheses.title: Structural market shift market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: A failed boundary break reverts toward the prior range.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Failed breaks create measurable reversal opportunities.
hypotheses.observation: False breakout is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.168519, event_rate=0.174202, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: A prior boundary break that closes back inside the range using only current and previous bars.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if false-breakout reversals fail unchanged gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: A prior boundary break that closes back inside the range using only current and previous bars.

hypotheses.title: False breakout market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: Expansion follows through without breaching existing drawdown and regime-stability gates.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Directional volatility expansion with participation produces continuation opportunities.
hypotheses.observation: Volatility expansion is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.229371, event_rate=0.164445, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

test_summary.definition: Current true range expansion versus the prior rolling median range.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if expansion entries reverse or collapse under unchanged validation gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Current true range expansion versus the prior rolling median range.

hypotheses.title: Volatility expansion market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: Signals with liquidity expansion show better follow-through than thin moves.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Participation expansion improves reliability of directional signals.
hypotheses.observation: Liquidity expansion is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.204843, event_rate=0.121120, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

test_summary.definition: Current volume and dollar volume expansion versus prior rolling medians.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if liquidity-filtered signals fail unchanged validation gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Current volume and dollar volume expansion versus prior rolling medians.

hypotheses.title: Liquidity expansion market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: The trend resumes after a measurable retracement.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Bounded pullbacks inside aligned trends create better continuation entries.
hypotheses.observation: Pullback quality is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.119243, event_rate=0.065499, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: Retracement depth inside an EMA-aligned trend plus reclaim confirmation.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if bounded pullbacks fail unchanged validation gates or only work on source evidence.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Retracement depth inside an EMA-aligned trend plus reclaim confirmation.

hypotheses.title: Pullback quality market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: An overextended move reverts toward its local mean.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Exhausted extensions are more likely to mean-revert than continue.
hypotheses.observation: Exhaustion is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.178960, event_rate=0.029723, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: Overextension from EMA20 combined with RSI extremes and decelerating momentum.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if exhaustion entries fail unchanged economic or drawdown gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Overextension from EMA20 combined with RSI extremes and decelerating momentum.

hypotheses.title: Exhaustion market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: Price follows through after a clean, participated range break.
hypotheses.hypothesis: High-quality breakouts are more likely to continue than boundary touches.
hypotheses.observation: Breakout quality is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.153896, event_rate=0.024815, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: Break distance beyond the prior high, close location, and volume participation measured at the bar.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if quality-filtered breakouts fail unchanged expectancy or stability gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Break distance beyond the prior high, close location, and volume participation measured at the bar.

hypotheses.title: Breakout quality market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: A controlled retracement resumes in the direction of the established trend.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Mature but non-exhausted trends create higher-quality pullback continuation opportunities.
hypotheses.observation: Trend maturity is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.085345, event_rate=0.022042, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: Bars in an aligned EMA20/EMA50 trend, normalized by a capped trend-age window.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if mature-trend pullbacks fail unchanged trade-count, expectancy, drawdown, or walk-forward gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Bars in an aligned EMA20/EMA50 trend, normalized by a capped trend-age window.

hypotheses.title: Trend maturity market-structure hypothesis

hypotheses.expected_behavior: A narrow range resolves directionally after sufficient compression.
hypotheses.hypothesis: Contractions define cleaner range-breakout staging areas.
hypotheses.observation: Volatility contraction is measured deterministically on frozen dataset 1: score=0.117351, event_rate=0.005350, sample_size=63340. Post-hoc and unconfirmed.

contradictory_observations: The observation is measurable but sparse or weak on this preserved dataset.
test_summary.definition: Recent median true range below the prior baseline true range without using future bars.
test_summary.falsification_criteria: Falsified if contraction breakouts do not survive unchanged validation gates.
test_summary.leakage_control: causal rolling windows only; no future bars used

measured.definition: Recent median true range below the prior baseline true range without using future bars.

exhaustion.definition: Overextension from EMA20 combined with RSI extremes and decelerating momentum.

false_breakout.definition: A prior boundary break that closes back inside the range using only current and previous bars.

liquidity_expansion.definition: Current volume and dollar volume expansion versus prior rolling medians.

momentum_persistence.definition: Share of same-direction closes inside the recent lookback, weighted by 5-bar return direction.

pullback_quality.definition: Retracement depth inside an EMA-aligned trend plus reclaim confirmation.

structural_shift.definition: Recent trend and volatility state diverges materially from the preceding baseline.

trend_acceleration.definition: Recent 5-bar return improvement versus the prior 5-bar return, scaled by recent volatility.

trend_maturity.definition: Bars in an aligned EMA20/EMA50 trend, normalized by a capped trend-age window.

volatility_contraction.definition: Recent median true range below the prior baseline true range without using future bars.

volatility_expansion.definition: Current true range expansion versus the prior rolling median range.
